# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { EdgeConfig } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const DEFAULT_API_KEY = 'vercel_default_key_789';
const DEFAULT_DB_URL = 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';

export default async function handler(request: Request) {
  try {
    const edgeConfig = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;
    
    if (!edgeConfig) {
      throw new Error('EDGE_CONFIG is not set');
    }

    const edgeConfigClient = new EdgeConfig(edgeConfig);
    
    const apiKey = await edgeConfigClient.get('api_key') || DEFAULT_API_KEY;
    const dbUrl = await edgeConfigClient.get('db_url') || DEFAULT_DB_URL;
    const featureFlag = await edgeConfigClient.get('feature_flag') || false;

    // Validate API key
    if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'vercel_default_key_789') {
      console.warn('Using default API key - this should be updated in Edge Config');
    }

    // Validate database URL
    if (!dbUrl || dbUrl === DEFAULT_DB_URL) {
      console.warn('Using default database URL - this should be updated in Edge Config');
    }

    // Secure headers
    const headers = new Headers({
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Cache-Control': 'private, no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate',
      'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
      'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
      'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
    });

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'success',
        data: {
          apiKey: apiKey,
          dbUrl: dbUrl,
          featureFlag: featureFlag,
        },
      }),
      { headers }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Edge function error:', error);
    
    const headers = new Headers({
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Cache-Control': 'private, no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate',
      'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
      'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
      'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
    });

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'error',
        message: 'Internal server error',
      }),
      { status: 500, headers }
    );
  }
}
